banner.title: Senior High School (Grades 11-12)
banner.subtitle: Preparing future leaders and skilled professionals for the community and beyond.

intro.title:
SHS Educational Transition
(SY 2026-2027)
intro.description: Starting SY 2026-2027, Upper Labay High School is implementing the Strengthened Senior High School Curriculum for incoming Grade 11 students. Grade 12 students will conclude their journey under the traditional K-12 program.

tiers.title: Grade 11: Strengthened SHS Curriculum
tiers.description: A modernized approach with reduced core subjects and specialized electives focused on two main pathways.

cards.title: Academic Pathway
cards.description: Designed for students pursuing higher education, focusing on foundational academic excellence and college readiness.

cards.title: Tech-Pro Pathway
cards.description: Focuses on technical-professional skills, preparing students for immediate industry entry or specialized technical careers.

tiers.title: Core Learning Tracks
tiers.description: Standard DepEd Senior High School curriculum with a localized lens.

cards.title: HUMSS Strand
cards.description: Humanities and Social Sciences. Preparing students for careers in law, journalism, and community development.

cards.title: TVL-FCS
cards.description: Technical Vocational Livelihood - Family and Consumer Sciences. Specializing in cookery and hospitality.
